title: Is it Worth Holding on to AvalonBay (AVB) Stock for Now?
text: AvalonBay (AVB) is well-poised to benefit from improving demand, portfolio expansion efforts and technological innovations. Stiff competition and interest rate hikes are concerning.

title: AvalonBay Communities, Inc. Declares Third Quarter 2022 Dividends
text: ARLINGTON, Va.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--AvalonBay Communities, Inc. (NYSE: AVB) announced today that its Board of Directors declared a cash dividend on the Company's Common Stock (par value $0.01 per share) for the third quarter of 2022. The Common Stock dividend is $1.59 per share and is payable October 17, 2022, to all Common Stockholders of Record as of September 30, 2022. About AvalonBay Communities, Inc.
